hyperedges.label: Form lifecycle: state manager + state machine + side effect scheduler
InputField discriminated union (Number/String variants keyed by props.type)
Array Button Mapper Family (shared logic pattern)
Value Field Mapper Specializations (slider/textarea/datepicker/options extend value base)
Derivation processing pipeline: collect -> sort -> apply
Async derivation streams (HTTP + async function) share the same stream pattern (debounceTime + switchMap + stopOnUserOverride)
Cross-field collection: detection + traversal + entry creation
Non-field element logic resolution family (hidden/disabled for buttons and text fields)
Logic function dispatch pattern (sync + async + http)
Expression parser stack (facade, parser, AST, errors)
Container Field Family (group/array/container all use ContainerLogicConfig and extend FieldDef<never>)
Field Definition Inheritance Hierarchy (FieldDef is base, BaseValueField + BaseCheckedField extend it with FieldWithValidation)
Field Rendering Pipeline (DynamicForm uses DfFieldOutlet to render ResolvedFields)
Pub/Sub event flow: Dispatcher forwards to Bus which routes to FormEvent subscribers
Barrel re-exports all public event APIs
FormEvent base interface and concrete event implementations
Container field components share resolution pipeline
Developer experience helpers for form authoring
Config validation pipeline: traverse, dedupe keys, verify types, validate regex
Container field processors memoization pattern (flatten, keyBy, defaults)
Array event normalization to ArrayAction stream
Component initialization event flow (emit -> track -> setup)
Test harness components registered by DynamicFormTestUtils
Page orchestration validation triad (mode, validity-guard, auto-redirect)
